scripts.db:migrate:local: bun run --cwd apps/api wrangler d1 migrations apply alvas-dev --local
scripts.db:migrate:staging: bun run --cwd apps/api wrangler d1 migrations apply alvas-staging --remote --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:production: bun run --cwd apps/api wrangler d1 migrations apply alvas-main --remote --env production
scripts.db:reset: bun run --cwd apps/api wrangler d1 execute alvas-dev --local --file ../../scripts/clean-dev-db.sql && bun run db:migrate:local
scripts.db:reset:staging: bun run --cwd apps/api wrangler d1 execute alvas-staging --remote --env staging --file ../../scripts/clean-dev-db.sql && bun run db:migrate:staging
scripts.db:reset:production: bun run --cwd apps/api wrangler d1 execute alvas-main --remote --env production --file ../../scripts/clean-dev-db.sql && bun run db:migrate:production
scripts.seed:local: bun run --cwd apps/api seed:generate && bun run --cwd apps/api seed:local
scripts.seed:staging: bun run --cwd apps/api seed:generate && bun run --cwd apps/api seed:staging
scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/api build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.coverage:domain: bun run test:coverage && bun scripts/check-domain-coverage.mjs apps/api/coverage/lcov.info 80
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:bdd && bun run test:web && bun run test:security && bun run coverage:domain && bun run test:mutation
scripts.docs:dev: bun run --cwd apps/web prepare && bun run --cwd apps/docs dev
scripts.docs:build: bun run --cwd apps/web prepare && bun run --cwd apps/docs build
scripts.format: prettier --write . && bun run --cwd apps/api format && bun run --cwd apps/web format
scripts.format:check: prettier --check . && bun run --cwd apps/api format:check && bun run --cwd apps/web format:check
scripts.lint: bun run format:check && bun run --cwd apps/api lint && bun run --cwd apps/web lint
